name: Transcribe Archive
description: Chunked, cache-friendly audio/video transcription with word-level timestamps, SRT/VTT export and a D2.10 trust badge. Long files are split into time windows so a single failure never wastes the whole job.

description_i18n.zh: 把长音视频按时间窗口分片转写，自带断点续传缓存，导出字幕 (SRT/VTT)、纯文本和 JSON 归档，并给出 D2.10 可信度徽章。
description_i18n.en: Chunked, cache-friendly audio/video transcription with word-level timestamps, SRT/VTT export and a D2.10 trust badge. Long files are split into time windows so a single failure never wastes the whole job.

author: OpenAkita
